_meta.description: GLP-1 insurance coverage probability matrix by carrier, state, medication, and indication
data_sources: PA approval rates from specialty pharmacy networks

mounjaro.notes: Off-label weight loss rarely covered. T2D or prediabetes pathway required.

ozempic.notes: Only FDA-approved for T2D. Insurance will not cover for weight loss.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: FL market active. BMI 30+ OR 27+ with comorbidity, 3-month diet history. No GLP-1 failure documentation required.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: Adding to formulary. Similar PA criteria to Wegovy.

zepbound_osa.notes: OSA pathway streamlined in Q1 2026. Strong approvals with sleep study (AHI 15+).

mounjaro_t2d.notes: Best-in-class T2D PA approvals. Straightforward clinical criteria.

ozempic_t2d.notes: No PA required for T2D in most FL Cigna plans. Tier 2 specialty.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Variable by employer contract. Step therapy (3 months diet + exercise) typically required.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication (prior MI/stroke/PAD/CAD + BMI 27+) significantly improves approval odds.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: Strong T2D coverage across all Cigna commercial plans.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: FL Aetna variable. Large group employer plans better. BMI 30+ with 3-month diet history. Step therapy may require Qsymia/phentermine trial first in some plans.

zepbound_osa.notes: OSA pathway viable for qualified patients.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway better than weight-loss.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: National plans: some require BMI 40+ or 35+ with comorbidity. Step therapy varies by contract.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication improves PA outlook nationally.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: Variable by employer contract. Check 2026 formulary.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: UHC FL: Navigate program enrollment may be required step. Large employers often carve out GLP-1 benefits separately.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: Navigate program step may apply. Varies by employer contract.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication significantly improves PA outlook.

ozempic_t2d.notes: Preferred T2D agent. No PA in most UHC plans.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Navigate program enrollment may be required. Employer contract heavily influences coverage.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication strong pathway nationally.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Significant FL presence. Variable by employer plan. BMI 30+ required. Balance model pilot ongoing.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication improves chances.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Variable by employer plan. BMI 30+ with step therapy.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Anthem GA: PA required. BMI 30+ with 3-month lifestyle intervention. Step therapy (phentermine, qsymia) may be required.
Anthem VA: Covers with PA. BMI 30+ or 27+ with comorbidity.
Anthem IN: Active formulary. BMI criteria standard.
Anthem/Elevance national: PA required. BMI 30+ (or 27+ with documented comorbidity). 3-month step therapy required in most plans.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication improves PA odds.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: Strong T2D coverage across Anthem commercial plans.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Highmark PA: Covers weight management with PA. BMI 35+ required in fully-insured plans (more restrictive than most). Self-insured employer plans may have different criteria.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway significantly better.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Highmark WV: Less restrictive than PA. BMI 30+ with step therapy.
PA required. BMI thresholds vary by plan (30-35+). Step therapy typical.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: CareFirst MD: Covers Wegovy with PA. MD mandate for fully-insured plans. BMI 30+ or 27+ with comorbidity. Step therapy: 3 months diet program.
CareFirst DC: Strong federal employee presence. Good coverage outlook. PA required.
PA required. Standard BMI criteria. State mandate compliance in MD/DC region.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication strong pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: NJ mandate applies to fully-insured plans. Horizon covers Wegovy with PA. BMI 30+ or 27+ with one comorbidity. Step therapy 3 months.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: Covered under NJ mandate with PA.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication excellent pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Pennsylvania Medicaid eliminated GLP-1 obesity coverage Jan 2026. Fully-insured commercial IBX plans followed. BMI 40+ may still apply in some self-insured large employer plans.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication still covered — prior MI/stroke/PAD/CAD required.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: BCBS TX: Large group employer plans cover Wegovy with PA. BMI 30+ or 27+ with T2D/HTN/dyslipidemia. 3-month step therapy. Fully-insured small group may be more restrictive.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication solid pathway for TX.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: Texas BCBS has strong T2D formulary. Large T2D population in TX state.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Blue Cross NC: Covers Wegovy with PA. BMI 30+ or 27+ with comorbidity. Step therapy required. Large employer plans more favorable.
BCBS TN: Covers for large employer groups with PA. BMI 30+ required. Fully-insured small groups more restrictive. 3-6 month step therapy.

bcbs_al.display_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Alabama

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: BCBS AL: Covers with PA for large employers. BMI 30+ required. Step therapy 3 months. High obesity prevalence in AL supports clinical case.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered — AL has high T2D prevalence.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: BCBS IL: One of the stronger HCSC state plans for GLP-1. Large employer market. BMI 30+ with step therapy. IL Medicaid mandate context helps.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: Covers with PA. Good state environment.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication solid.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: BCBS SC: Covers large group with PA. BMI 30+ criteria. Step therapy 3 months.

bcbs_az.display_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Arizona

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: BCBS AZ: PA required for commercial plans. BMI 30+ or 27+ with comorbidity. 3-month lifestyle step therapy.
FL Blue has maintained GLP-1 coverage where many BCBS plans dropped. PA criteria: BMI 30+ OR BMI 27+ with T2D/HTN/dyslipidemia. 3-month step therapy.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication streamlines PA significantly. Prior MI, stroke, PAD, or CAD required.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: Adding to formulary. Similar criteria to Wegovy.

zepbound_osa.notes: Strong OSA pathway. Sleep study (AHI 15+) and BMI 30+ are key.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: Preferred T2D agent. Lower step therapy burden.

ozempic_t2d.notes: Preferred agent, often no PA required for T2D.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Premera WA: Covers Wegovy with PA. BMI 30+ or 27+ with comorbidity. WA state has favorable regulatory environment.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Premera AK: Similar to WA. PA required.
Regence WA: Covers with PA. Standard BMI criteria. WA regulatory environment favorable.
Regence OR: Covers with PA. Good employer market in Portland metro.
Regence: PA required. Standard BMI/step therapy criteria.
Health Net CA: Restrictive. Requires BMI 40+ OR BMI 35+ with serious comorbidities. Most patients do not qualify.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication better pathway in CA.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Oscar marketplace plans: Typically exclude weight management medications. Employer-sponsored Oscar plans may have better coverage. Check plan-specific formulary.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication may be viable.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D generally covered on commercial plans.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Molina FL manages FL Medicaid — weight loss meds excluded per FL Medicaid policy.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered through FL Medicaid MCO.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: TX Medicaid Molina: Weight loss excluded.
Molina primarily manages Medicaid/CHIP — weight loss meds rarely covered. Follows state formulary rules.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D generally covered per state Medicaid rules.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: WellCare FL Medicaid: Weight loss excluded per FL Medicaid policy.

wegovy_cv.notes: FL Medicaid does not cover even CV indication for weight loss.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: WellCare primarily manages Medicaid/Medicare Advantage. Weight loss coverage follows state rules.
Ambetter marketplace plans: Weight loss medications routinely excluded. Low probability regardless of diagnosis.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication may have limited pathway but very variable.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered on most Ambetter plans.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: CareSource OH Medicaid: Very limited. BMI 40+ only with comprehensive documented failure of conservative therapy. Not practical for most patients.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered via OH Medicaid MCO.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: CareSource GA Medicaid: Effectively not covered. No pathway.
CareSource manages Medicaid — weight loss coverage follows state rules, generally poor.
Harvard Pilgrim MA: BCBS MA dropped coverage Jan 2026. Harvard Pilgrim followed similar trajectory. Only 20% of employers bought rider. Without rider, effectively excluded.

wegovy_weight_loss_rider.notes: If employer bought supplemental coverage rider.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication still viable in MA.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Harvard Pilgrim NH: Better than MA. Covers with standard PA criteria.
Harvard Pilgrim ME: Standard PA criteria.
Tufts MA: Same MA market situation — coverage dropped Jan 2026. Employer rider required.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication viable.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Excellus NY: NY market favorable. Covers Wegovy with PA under commercial plans. BMI 30+ standard criteria.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication very strong in NY.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: EmblemHealth NY: NYC-area plan. Covers Wegovy with PA. NY market favorable but PA criteria can be rigorous.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication strong.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Medica MN: Covers with PA for large employer groups. BMI 30+ standard criteria. Strong clinical program.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: PA required. Upper Midwest regional plans.
HealthPartners MN: Strong clinical program integration. Covers with PA. Active weight management programs that pair well with GLP-1 therapy.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: SelectHealth UT: Covers Wegovy with PA. Standard BMI 30+ criteria. Integrated with Intermountain Health clinical programs.
Geisinger PA: Follows PA market — restrictive post-Jan 2026 PA Medicaid elimination. Commercial plans more variable. PA for weight management requires BMI 35+.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication better pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: UPMC PA: Self-insured large employer market is better. Fully-insured plans follow PA market restrictions. BMI 35+ for fully-insured; BMI 30+ possible for self-insured.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Medical Mutual OH: Covers for large employer groups. BMI 30+ with step therapy. Ohio market reasonably favorable.
Providence OR: Covers Wegovy with PA. BMI 30+ standard criteria. Pacific Northwest favorable environment.
Providence WA: Similar to OR. Covers with PA.
Moda OR: Covers with PA for commercial plans. Standard BMI criteria.
TRICARE: Generally excluded as non-formulary. Exception request required. Very unlikely without strong documented comorbidity profile.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication is a stronger pathway for TRICARE. Prior MI/stroke/PAD/CAD + BMI 27+ required.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: TRICARE: Not covered for weight loss.

zepbound_osa.notes: OSA pathway may be viable for TRICARE.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: FEP: One of the strongest federal programs for GLP-1. Covers Wegovy with PA. BMI 30+ or 27+ with comorbidity.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication excellent for FEP.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: VA: Non-formulary. Exception request (non-formulary request) required. Document comorbidities and failed behavioral interventions heavily.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication may support non-formulary request for veterans with prior cardiac events.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Statutory exclusion. Medicare Part D cannot cover weight-loss-only indication by law.

wegovy_cv.notes: If patient has prior MI, stroke, PAD, or CAD + BMI 27+, prescribed for CV risk reduction. Not all Part D plans have added yet.

zepbound_osa.notes: If patient has moderate-severe OSA (AHI 15+) + BMI 30+. Not all Part D plans have added yet.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: Fully covered for T2D under Part D.

ozempic_t2d.notes: Fully covered for T2D under Part D.

wegovy_cv.notes: UHC Medicare Advantage FL: SELECT plan includes CV indication for qualified members. Prior cardiac event + BMI 27+ required.

zepbound_osa.notes: Some MA plans adding OSA indication in 2026.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered under MA Part D benefit.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Medicare Advantage statutory exclusion for weight loss.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway varies by MA plan. SELECT and Choice Plus plans more likely.

zepbound_osa.notes: OSA indication being added to some MA plans.

wegovy_cv.notes: Humana Medicare Advantage FL: Some plans include CV indication. Gold Plus and PPO plans more likely to cover.

zepbound_osa.notes: OSA pathway expanding in 2026 MA plans.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Medicare Advantage statutory exclusion for weight loss.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication varies by plan.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Medicare statutory exclusion applies.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication for eligible Aetna MA members.

zepbound_osa.notes: OSA pathway in select Aetna MA plans.

wegovy_cv.notes: Devoted Health FL: Florida-focused MA plan. Adding CV indication coverage in 2026. Responsive to clinical documentation.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Weight control medications explicitly excluded under FL Medicaid.

wegovy_cv.notes: FL Medicaid does not cover even CV indication for GLP-1 weight loss use.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: Covered for T2D only through MCO formulary.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: MOST GENEROUS STATE. No PA required. Meds on formulary, pharmacy fills like any Rx. BMI 30+ or 27+ with comorbidity.
Simple criteria: BMI 30+ with PA. No diet documentation or comorbidity required. One of the most accessible Medicaid states.
Texas Medicaid: Does NOT cover weight loss medications. No pathway for obesity indication.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered through TX Medicaid MCO.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Ohio Medicaid: Very restrictive. BMI 40+ with comprehensive documented behavioral failure. Not practical for most patients.
Georgia Medicaid: Effectively not covered for weight management. No viable pathway.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered via GA Medicaid MCO.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: ELIMINATED Jan 2026. Pennsylvania Medicaid formally eliminated GLP-1 obesity coverage effective January 1, 2026.

wegovy_cv.notes: Eliminated along with all weight management GLP-1 coverage.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: NC Medicaid: Very limited. BMI 40+ with documented multi-year behavioral failure. Effectively not available for most patients.
WA Apple Health: More generous than most Medicaid states. Covers with PA for BMI 30+ with documented comorbidity. WA has progressive healthcare coverage policies.
Colorado Medicaid: More accessible than national Medicaid average. PA required with BMI 30+ and 3-month documented diet attempt.
TennCare: Effectively excluded. Tennessee Medicaid is one of the most restrictive states for obesity medications.
ELIMINATED Jan 2026. Medi-Cal eliminated all weight loss GLP-1 coverage. OSA/CV indications may still be covered.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication still covered post-elimination.

zepbound_osa.notes: OSA indication may still be covered.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: DROPPED coverage Jan 2026. Only covered if employer purchased optional rider (20% did). Without rider, effectively excluded.

wegovy_weight_loss_rider.notes: If employer bought the optional rider, approval rates reasonable with full documentation.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication still covered regardless of weight loss exclusion.

zepbound_weight_loss.notes: Same — dropped unless employer bought rider.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: DROPPED for fully-insured large groups effective Jan 2025. Requires BMI 35+ if any coverage remains. Self-insured employers may still cover.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication still viable.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Requires BMI 40+ AND participation in comprehensive weight loss program. Very restrictive criteria.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication pathway much better than weight loss.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Kaiser CA: Internal formulary management. Restrictive. Strong internal weight management programs (Step 1: behavioral). Better via diabetes pathway.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication better pathway.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: Kaiser WA: More generous than CA. WA regulatory environment helps.
Kaiser CO: Reasonable coverage. PA required.
Kaiser generally restrictive for GLP-1 weight loss. Internal clinical pathway (behavioral programs first) required.
AllWays (MGBHP) MA: Similar to BCBS MA market. Coverage dropped following 2026 market trend. Employer rider possible.

wegovy_cv.notes: CV indication still viable.

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: CHPW WA: Manages Medicaid in WA (Apple Health). WA is generous — PA required but criteria reasonable (BMI 30+).
Quartz WI: Covers with PA for commercial plans. Standard BMI criteria.
Dean Health/Medica WI: Covers with PA for employer groups. Standard criteria.
Sanford ND: Covers with PA. BMI 30+ standard criteria. Regional plan with strong rural penetration.
Sanford SD: Similar to ND.
UCare MN: Covers with PA for commercial and Medicare Advantage plans. BMI 30+ with step therapy.
PacificSource OR: Commercial plans cover with PA. BMI 30+ standard criteria.
PacificSource ID: Standard PA criteria.

bcbs_ks.display_name: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kansas

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: BCBS KS: Covers with PA for large employer groups. BMI 30+ standard criteria.
Wellmark IA: Covers with PA. BMI 30+ standard criteria. Iowa employer market.
BCBS NM: HCSC plan. Covers with PA. BMI 30+ criteria.
BCBS OK: HCSC plan. Covers with PA. High obesity rates in OK support clinical case.

mounjaro_t2d.notes: T2D covered — high T2D prevalence in OK.

bcbs_mt.display_name: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Montana (HCSC)

wegovy_weight_loss.notes: BCBS MT: HCSC plan. Covers with PA.

CT.notes: Employers can opt out. State employee plan covers but requires Teladoc lifestyle program.

DE.notes: Smaller state with less carrier variation.

MD.notes: Strong regulatory environment. CareFirst must comply.

NJ.notes: Medicaid does NOT cover weight loss. Horizon BCBS and other carriers must cover fully-insured plans.

VT.notes: BCBS VT restricting weight-loss coverage in 2026. CV still covered.

WV.notes: State employee pilot paused 2024 due to $1.3M/month costs.

MA.notes: BCBS MA dropped weight loss coverage. Only 20% of employers bought rider.

MI.notes: BCBS MI dropped for fully-insured large groups.

CA.notes: Medi-Cal eliminated all weight loss GLP-1 coverage.

PA.notes: PA Medicaid eliminated GLP-1 coverage for obesity. Commercial plans following.

t2d.notes: Shifts to diabetes indication. Near-universal coverage.

prediabetes.notes: Opens Mounjaro off-label pathway with physician advocacy.

cvd.notes: Opens Wegovy CV risk reduction indication.

osa.notes: Opens Zepbound OSA indication (FDA approved Dec 2024).

mash.notes: Opens Wegovy MASH indication (FDA approved Aug 2025).

obesity.notes: BMI 30+ meets base criteria for most plans.

metabolic.notes: Metabolic syndrome supports PA and Mounjaro pathway.

large_5000_plus.notes: 43% of firms with 5000+ employees cover GLP-1s

small_under_500.notes: Lower coverage rates in small employer plans

government_federal.notes: BCBS FEP, TRICARE — strong coverage for qualifying indications

self_employed.notes: Individual market and marketplace plans rarely cover

marketplace_aca.notes: ACA marketplace plans have the lowest probability for weight loss coverage
